review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json < staged diff prompt > /tmp/cp00-103-claude-review-output-valid.json

parsed_review.rationale: Reviewed only the staged diff for CP00-103 (Risk A permission review packet boundary, range RP01.P06.M08.S17-RP01.P06.M09.S06, 10 units). All scoped safety constraints are satisfied and adequately gated. (1) Audit event expectation: the audit_event_expectation item carries audit_expectation_only=true and writes_audit_event=false; audit_event_expectation_policy='expected_only_until_rp03_audit_kernel' confirms reference-only with no ledger write. (2) Permission fixture: permission_fixture item carries permission_fixture_only=true with permission_fixture_policy='reference_only_until_rp02_permission_kernel'; no runtime evaluation. (3) Allowed/denied tests: allowed_test (expected_effect=allow, expected_route=ready) and denied_test (expected_effect=deny, expected_route=blocked, blocked_claims=['deny_reference_blocks_access']) are expected-outcome references only under allowed_denied_test_policy='expected_outcome_only_no_runtime_evaluation'; evaluates_runtime_permission=false on every item. (4) Export/share decision bindings: export_decision_binding (route=approval_required, decision_binding=approval_required_reference, download_generated=false) and share_decision_binding (route=approval_required, external_party_ref='external_party_reference_only') both set approval_required=true, audit_event_expected=true, executes_export_download=false, executes_external_share=false; export_policy/share_policy both forbid download and external-share execution. Every produced artifact passes through freezeCp103Item, which forces synthetic_only=true, uses_real_client_data=false, evaluates_runtime_permission=false, writes_audit_event=false, writes_product_state=false, creates_database_rows=false, executes_export_download=false, executes_external_share=false, ldip_implemented=false; fixtures come from createCoreDomainSyntheticFixtureSet with synthetic-only IDs (req_rp01_cp103_review_packet, perm_rp01_cp103_reference, audit_ref_rp01_cp103_expectation). No code performs I/O, fetch, fs, DB, download, or external-share side effects — all functions return frozen reference objects. The contract block mirrors all no-write flags and lists forbidden_claims (runtime_permission_evaluated, audit_event_written, product_state_mutated, database_row_created, real_client_data_loaded, export_download_executed, external_share_executed, ldip_implemented). Production-ready gating is adequate: production_ready_flag='core_domain_permission_review_packet_binding_verified' is asserted by the validator; validateCoreDomainCp103Coverage enforces 4 evidence bindings, 2 decision bindings, all 10 covered units (S17-S20 + M09.S01-S06 derived from item source_unit_ids), allowed/denied outcomes, approval+audit-expectation on decisions, and per-item synthetic-only/no-write/non-runtime/no-LDIP checks; the .mjs validator independently re-verifies contract flags, covered units, evidence/decision/forbidden-claim lists, policies, and cp103 coverage counts; four node:test cases assert pack binding, reference-only review items, approval-without-execution decision bindings, and production-gated manifest/evidence/Claude/handoff outputs. The Claude review packet correctly declares model=claude-opus-4-8, effort=max, read_only=true, exactly_one_valid_pack_review_required=true, and the handoff carries ldip_implemented=false. No runtime permission evaluation, audit writes, product-state writes, database rows, real client data, export/download execution, external-share execution, or LDIP implementation is present. No P0-P3 findings.
notes: No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings were reported by the valid CP00-103 pack-level Claude review.
